MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PATRICK R. MAHONEY, TEL. NO. 1-213-805-5677 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Randall Larry Krenzin's Verified Petition To Confim The Final Dispute Resolution Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed.
